creator: shikut@belpak.brest.by
text:
Computer description: 586-100Mhz, 32Mb RAM, 2Gb HDD, Digiboard PC/Xe (on isa), 8 Telebit XPresso modems.
This kernel message appear some times imediatly after modems disconnection, but not always. It's very strange for me, cause on FreeBSD 3.3.0 there are no such messages.

Solution of this problem is very important for me, cause am trying to setup 3.5.1 on uucp server with more then 800 users. If it possible, answer to me as quickly as it possible.

Fix: 

No fix.
How-To-Repeat: I don't know.
